caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall. The text "Ashish Raichur" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. He is speaking, and his expressions and gestures shift as the sequence progresses. In the first frame, he is gesturing with his right hand while his left hand is held near his chest. In the second frame, he remains still with his arms down. In the third frame, he continues to speak with a neutral posture. In the final frame, he raises both hands, gesturing outward with open palms to emphasize his point. Throughout the sequence, he remains centered in the frame, with the lighting and background remaining constant.
